summary: Frontend-only iteration 11: validated the hero marquee size reduction and the new 'Three ways to work with us' section across all 8 service detail pages. 17/17 checks passed, 0 console errors.
verified_behaviour: Hero .marquee-text computed font-size at 1920px viewport = 35.2px (was ~72px); clamp(0.95rem,2.2vw,2.2rem) applied as intended — roughly half the prior size.
All 8 service detail pages render data-testid='three-ways-section'.
All 8 pages expose mode-own (Set up. Hand over.), mode-ai (Set up + expert AI inside.), mode-managed (We drive for 3-6 months.).
mode-ai shows '★ most popular' badge and has md:scale-[1.03] class for slight scale-up at md+ breakpoints.
Section headline contains both 'You own it.' and 'We help you run it.'

Section paragraph mentions the exact service title on each page (e.g. 'Ad Management', 'Digital Ecosystems', 'Website Development', 'App Development + AI', 'AI Automation', 'Custom AI & Prompts', 'Social Media', 'Creative Studio').
Hand-drawn 'mix & match' note present at bottom of every three-ways section.
Service intros mention 'you own/yours', AI and the '3-6 month' managed option.
No console errors on any service detail page nor on /, /work, /examples, /process, /contact, /readiness-plan.
Mobile (375x844) on /services/ad-management: three-ways cards stack 1-col vertically (tops 5018 -> 5300 -> 5606) with no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth == windowWidth = 375).
critical_code_review_comments: ThreeWays.jsx and ServiceDetail.jsx are clean, well-scoped, no DRY violations.
Marquee CSS clamp implemented correctly with proper min/preferred/max units.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified marquee size reduction + new ThreeWays section across all 8 service detail pages. All checks green, no follow-up required.
